{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193638F80726ABDA96484E18FC"}"},"total":61},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612558352285827864","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错不错，就是主角刚进Nba.就是超巨了，战力太顶了，感觉快要大结局了，不过主角见到科比热泪盈眶的那一幕确实很感动，写出了大部分人在大年初二得知老大坠机时的震惊与不愿相信！加油，顺便期待下作者的下部佳作！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772440291,"group_id":"7583410133531626520","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N80YUTuuOTWyi6yUdUX7EwU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"6729723349","user_name":"用户67297233"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6729723349","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583410133531626520","book_info":{"abstract":"评分刚出，后面会涨！！！
【魂穿+系统+校花+慢节奏+非无脑爽】加班猝死的社畜程序员林飞，一睁眼竟魂穿 2002 年，成了个高一新生！他反手一个神操作：劝姚明 2006 年跳出火箭合同，空降洛杉矶！禅师掌印，三角进攻威震联盟，林 + 科 + 姚的三巨头组合横空出世，总冠军奖杯拿到手软，导致老詹提前决定一！08 年奥运赛场，林飞携手姚明，易建联组成的华夏三叉戟，更是闪耀世界，成为那年盛夏最耀眼的传奇！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9bc8e78806f0452ce862e4bfddc02537~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"三块叉烧","author_id":"","book_id":"7583410133531626520","book_name":"重生2002，和姚明科比做队友","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7583534722039431705","read_count":"59061","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"720387"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.1","serial_count":"270","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,穿越,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9bc8e78806f0452ce862e4bfddc02537~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363398&x-signature=uI73lESO5eVnjQjV1931XVCL9nE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"97607901091","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"196"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193638F80726ABDA96484E18FC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11263,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":36167,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":2524},
